titles.text: アナザー・メモリーズ

descriptions.text: Another Memories is a simulation adventure game from the creators of Yūkyū Gensōkyoku, with a focus on managing schedules and relationships as well as card-based battles. The player controls Jeynus, deciding his schedule for each week, exploring the campus and city and speaking with other students, and going on expeditions fighting creatures. Different activities will increase his stats, trigger various events and lead to relationships with the various female students, and determine his prospects and the game's ending after two in-game years. Combat takes the form of a deck-building card game, where the player can construct a deck of cards consisting of both element cards and spell cards, using them in turn-based battles.
Another Memories is a dating simulation game in which the player controls a young magician apprentice.
